summary: Switch live search and totals commands from the stale listingajax endpoints to the canonical website results page HTML.
reason: Fresh browser HARs showed the live Arroios results flow no longer calls listingajax.ajax, while the page HTML still contains the current listing cards and result count needed for API-first website-native search.
validated_outcome: Internal CLI, client, and MCP tests pass; live search now targets the current results page path but still requires a fresh accepted website session cookie.
